Encryption module uses hardcoded initialization vectors or lacks proper key rotation mechanisms
issues.suggested_fix: Use cryptographically secure IV generation and implement key rotation policies

issues.description: Workflow execution doesn't implement proper caching for repeated operations
issues.suggested_fix: Add caching layer for workflow execution results with proper cache invalidation

issues.description: Webhook context doesn't properly validate incoming request payloads
issues.suggested_fix: Add schema validation for webhook payloads and proper error responses

issues.description: Expression evaluation allows arbitrary JavaScript execution without proper sandboxing
issues.suggested_fix: Implement proper sandboxing or use a safe expression evaluation library

issues.description: Node execution lacks proper retry logic for transient failures
issues.suggested_fix: Implement exponential backoff and retry logic for transient errors

issues.description: Encryption cipher uses ECB mode which is insecure for most use cases. ECB mode doesn't provide serious message confidentiality and can leak patterns in the plaintext.
issues.suggested_fix: Use CBC, GCM, or other secure modes with proper IV generation instead of ECB mode.

issues.description: Expression evaluation uses Function constructor which allows arbitrary code execution. This creates a serious security vulnerability if user input can influence expressions.
issues.suggested_fix: Replace Function constructor with a safe expression parser or implement proper sandboxing with strict allowlists.

issues.description: Workflow execution creates many small objects and arrays that could benefit from object pooling. The frequent allocations could cause garbage collection pressure under heavy load.
issues.suggested_fix: Implement object pooling for frequently created execution context objects and arrays.

issues.description: Workflow validation doesn't properly distinguish between user errors and system errors, making it difficult to provide appropriate error messages and recovery strategies.
issues.suggested_fix: Create distinct error classes for user errors vs system errors with appropriate handling for each type.

issues.description: Node execution doesn't implement circuit breakers for external service calls, making the system vulnerable to cascading failures when downstream services are unavailable.
issues.suggested_fix: Implement circuit breaker pattern with configurable thresholds and fallback behavior.
